domains.name: game
domains.prompt: Build a playable browser mini game with score, restart, keyboard, and touch controls.
domains.modification_request: Add a restart button and verify it preserves score reset behavior.
evidence: Artifact opened and score/restart/keyboard/touch flows were checked

domains.name: booking
domains.prompt: Build a meeting room booking website with room filters, availability, and reservation states.
domains.modification_request: Add an unavailable-room edge case and verify the disabled reservation state.
evidence: Artifact opened and filters/empty/unavailable/reservation states were checked
